object_recognition.caption: The night frames show a dark kitchen setting where several objects are laid out on a metallic countertop. In the center, there is a white rectangular cutting board with an orange carrot and a black Y-shaped vegetable peeler on top. To the right of the cutting board lies a large kitchen knife with a silver blade and a textured metallic handle. Further right, a white ceramic bowl is visible. On the far left, a portion of a grey laptop is seen next to a black glass induction cooktop.

spatial_reasoning.caption: The orange carrot is positioned centrally on the white cutting board, with the black peeler resting to its left. The large silver knife is placed to the immediate right of the cutting board. A white ceramic bowl sits further to the right, beyond the knife. The laptop is situated on the left side of the counter, adjacent to the black cooktop. I am standing approximately half a step away from the center of the prep area.

spatial_reasoning.answer: The black peeler is located to the left of the carrot.

non_common.caption: A notable observation is the placement of a laptop immediately adjacent to the induction cooktop on a kitchen counter. This is impractical and hazardous, as heat from cooking or accidental spills could easily damage the electronic device. It is recommended to move the laptop to a dedicated desk or a safer area of the kitchen away from cooking surfaces.

non_common.answer: The laptop is placed right next to the induction cooktop.
